StructurePhase.Reference: Bückle H., Z. Metallkd., v37 p53 (1946)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 261177. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: powder metallurgical technique. Article Title: Aufbau und Mikroharte der Zwei- und Dreistoffsysteme der Metalle Niob, Tantal, Molybdan und Wolfram. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a.
